summary: All 11 modules + full chip pass RTL-to-GDSII. Full chip DRC/LVS clean. 3 minor antenna violations remain. dms_fusion RTL complete (sim: 14/14 pass), ASIC run pending.

full_chip.hold_note: Input-port hold -61ps in FF corner only — SDC artifact (set_input_delay -min 0.0). Not a real silicon violation. R2R hold clean.
full_chip.antenna_note: 3 nets remain despite heuristic diode insertion. Minor — acceptable for Chipignite submission.

gaze_tracker.notes: TinyTapeout candidate. Minimum viable die for this cell count.

tmr_voter.notes: Highest utilization at 150x150 — do not reduce die.

ecc_secded.notes: 6 antenna violations standalone. RUN_HEURISTIC_DIODE_INSERTION added to config. 64-bit SECDED XOR logic is cell-heavy. Needed 300x300 (failed at 200x200).

mac_array.notes: Standalone WNS +0.943 ns (tight). In full chip R2R context timing is clean (+7.2 ns at TT). Standalone WNS was pessimistic due to SDC input_delay. No RTL changes needed.

dms_fusion.notes: New sensor fusion module. Combines gaze_tracker + head_pose_tracker into driver_attention_level[2:0]. IIR smoothing, ASIL-D watchdog. ASIC run not yet executed — use config_dms_fusion.yaml.

fault_predictor.notes: Rolling window multiply path — was flagged as timing risk. DELAY 1 strategy resolved it cleanly.

sdc_lessons.set_load: Use 0.05 pF (not 17.65 — that is fF for Yosys, not pF for OpenSTA)
sdc_lessons.remove_from_collection: Synopsys DC only — use all_inputs directly in OpenSTA
sdc_lessons.hold_input_port: set_input_delay -min 0.0 causes FF corner input-port hold violations — not real silicon violations
